message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

actor User
database Datastore

box "Application Layer" #LightGray
participant "«@Controller»\nSubscriptionController" as SC <<C>>
end box

box "Domain Model Layer" #LightGray
participant "«@Bean»\nSubscriptionServiceImpl" as SSI <<C>>
end box

box "Infrastructure Layer" #LightGray
participant "«@Bean»\nJpaSubscriptionRepository" as JSR <<C>>
participant "«@Repository»\nSubscriptionPersistenceJpaRepository" as SPJR <<C>>
end box

User -> SC : 
activate SC

note over SSI : via SubscriptionService
SC --> SSI : 
activate SSI

note over JSR : via SubscriptionRepository
SSI --> JSR : 
activate JSR

note over SPJR : via Spring data repository
JSR --> SPJR : 
activate SPJR

SPJR --> Datastore : 
Datastore --> SPJR : 
deactivate SPJR

JSR <-- SPJR : 
deactivate JSR

SSI <-- JSR : 
deactivate SSI

SC <-- SSI : 

User <-- SC : 
deactivate SC

@enduml
```
